command:
TOKEN="044bcb952fed5555ef1bc32c0449e010f9a3f9a6"
BASE="http://localhost:3000/api/v1"

echo "=== REPO ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" $BASE/repos/jose/Moreno-AI | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('Name:', d.get('name'))
print('Private:', d.get('private'))
print('Description:', d.get('description'))
"

echo "=== TAG ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" $BASE/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/tags | python3 -c "
import sys,json; tags=json.load(sys.stdin)
for t in tags: print('Tag:', t.get('name'))
if not tags: print('NO TAGS FOUND')
"

echo "=== WORKFLOW FILE ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" "$BASE/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/workflows/router/chatgpt-homelab-agent-router-Phase6B2-RouterHealth.json" | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('File:', d.get('name'))
print('Path:', d.get('path'))
print('Size:', d.get('size'), 'bytes')
"

echo "=== TOP-LEVEL CONTENTS ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" "$BASE/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/contents/" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
items=json.load(sys.stdin)
for i in sorted(items, key=lambda x: x.get('name','')):
    print(i.get('type','?')[0].upper(), i.get('name'))
"

echo "=== LAST COMMIT ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" "$BASE/repos/jose/Moreno-AI/commits?limit=1" | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if d:
    print('Message:', d[0].get('commit',{}).get('message'))
    print('SHA:', d[0].get('sha','')[:12])
"
